节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the bluetooth of the enterprise devices.
The information of device bluetooth.
The name of bluetooth.
The state of bluetooth.
The state of bluetooth connection
Bluetooth protocol
Gatt protocol.
Spp protocol.
Opp protocol.
Gets bluetooth information. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.

节点.功能描述: Adds devices to the list of bluetooth devices that are allowed to be connected. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. The size of the array after setting cannot be greater than 1000. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { Array<string> } deviceIds - IDs of the bluetooth devices to be added to the list.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200010 - A conflict policy has been configured.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
IDs of the bluetooth devices to be added to the list.

节点.功能描述: Turn on bluetooth. This function can be called by a super administrator. If the admin is not empty, it must have the corresponding permission.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 203 - This function is prohibited by enterprise management policies.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
This function is prohibited by enterprise management policies.

节点.功能描述: Adds protocols to the list of bluetooth server that are disallowed to use. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { number } accountId - accountId indicates the local ID of the OS account.
@param { Array<Protocol> } protocols - protocol of the bluetooth to be added to the list.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
accountId indicates the local ID of the OS account.
protocol of the bluetooth to be added to the list.
